SEARCH

Class QuarterBack

java.lang.Object
QuarterBack
All Implemented Interfaces:
FootballPlayer
public class QuarterBack extends Object implements FootballPlayer
The QuarterBack class represents a football quarterback. It stores quarterback implements from footballplayer

  • Constructor Details

    • QuarterBack

      public QuarterBack()
      default constructor

    • QuarterBack

      public QuarterBack(String name, String nflTeam, int noGamesPlayed, int passAttempts, int passCompleted, int totalYard, int touchDowns)
      Parameterized constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - player name
      nflTeam - NFL team name
      noGamesPlayed - number of games played
      passAttempts - number of pass attempts
      passCompleted - number of completed passes
      totalYard - total passing yards
      touchDowns - total passing touchdowns
